worthSeeing.title: Bagan:
worthSeeing.text: Plain of 3,000 ancient pagodas stretching to the horizon, one of Asia's great sights.

worthSeeing.title: Inle Lake:
worthSeeing.text: Stilted villages and leg-rowing fishermen on a serene highland lake.

worthSeeing.title: Shwedagon Pagoda:
worthSeeing.text: Gold-plated stupa in Yangon revered as the holiest Buddhist site in Myanmar.
